body:
Anna, it was great catching up with you at the [Breakthrough Energy Summit](events/breakthrough-energy-summit) last week — your remarks on the policy tailwinds for long-duration storage really stuck with me. I've been thinking more about the conversation we had around [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital)'s thesis as we head into the back half of the year, and I'd love your perspective on a few deals I'm currently evaluating at the seed stage. One is in grid-edge AI optimization and the other is a novel electrolysis materials play — both are early but have strong technical founders. Would you have 30 minutes sometime in the next couple of weeks for a call? Your instincts on founder-market fit in deep tech have been invaluable to me, and I'd genuinely appreciate the input before I go back to either team with next steps.

Amara
